svg.text: Each input is a UTXO from a different address, each needs its own key
For each input, the device finds the pubkey in the script,
searches receive chain (m/.../0/x) then change chain (m/.../1/x),
derives the private key for that index, computes sighash, signs with Schnorr.
Each input gets its own 64-byte signature. All packed into the signed KSPT.
The fee is implicit: sum(inputs) - sum(outputs) = fee. No fee output.
